title: Fancy Crosshair
description: Highly customizable PvP crosshair mod for Fabric with presets, target crosshair, hit animations, cooldown editor, shield/elytra indicators and more.
body:
Fancy Crosshair

A highly customizable crosshair mod for Fabric focused on PvP and clean visuals.

Customize almost every part of your crosshair:

* Change color, scale and opacity
* Add outlines
* Draw your own custom crosshair
* Or use one of the 10 built-in presets

The mod also includes a separate **Target Crosshair** system:

* Automatically changes when you can hit an entity/player
* Fully customizable independently from the main crosshair
* Supports custom drawing, presets, colors and scale

Extra PvP features:

* Hit pop animation when landing hits
* Elytra indicator below the crosshair
* Shield blocking indicator when opponents are defending

 Cooldown Customization

* Editable attack cooldown bar
* Customize cooldown colors and style independently

 Controls

* Open the config menu with the **V** key
* The keybind can be changed anytime from Minecraft controls settings

Designed for players who want a clean, responsive and fully personalized PvP experience.
